title: Respiratory Therapist
description: Support patient care at Parexel as a Respiratory Therapist, providing therapeutic respiratory interventions and monitoring.
responsibilities: Administer respiratory therapy treatments and inhalation medications
Document treatment details and patient progress
Collaborate with care teams on patient management
Support emergency response and code situations

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
